case_title: PER KARL JOHNSSON VS. BERNARDO ALCARAZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2024 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED DEC-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCARAZ, BERNARDO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHANSSON, PER KARL AS TO DEFENDANT ALCARAZ, BERNARDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY JOHANSSON, PER KARL AS TO DEFENDANT ALCARAZ, BERNARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHANSSON, PER KARL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF PER KARL JOHANSSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BERNARDO ALCARAZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHANSSON, PER KARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCARAZ, BERNARDO $4,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,190.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
